# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class TwilioSmsService
{
    protected string $accountSid;
    protected string $authToken;
    protected ?string $messagingServiceSid;
    protected ?string $from;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = (string) config('services.twilio.account_sid', env('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID'));
        $this->authToken = (string) config('services.twilio.auth_token', env('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'));
        $this->messagingServiceSid = config('services.twilio.messaging_service_sid', env('TWILIO_MESSAGING_SERVICE_SID'));
        $this->from = config('services.twilio.from', env('TWILIO_FROM'));

        if ($this->accountSid === '' || $this->authToken === '') {
            throw new \RuntimeException('Twilio credentials are not configured.');
        }
    }

    public function send(string $to, string $message, ?string $from = null, ?string $messagingServiceSid = null): array
    {
        $to = $this->normalizePhoneNumber($to);

        $payload = [
            'To' => $to,
            'Body' => $message,
        ];

        $messagingServiceSid = $messagingServiceSid ?? $this->messagingServiceSid;
        $from = $from ?? $this->from;

        if (!empty($messagingServiceSid)) {
            $payload['MessagingServiceSid'] = $messagingServiceSid;
        } elseif (!empty($from)) {
            $payload['From'] = $this->normalizePhoneNumber($from);
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Either a Twilio Messaging Service SID or a From number must be configured.');
        }

        $url = sprintf(
            'https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/%s/Messages.json',
            $this->accountSid
        );

        $response = Http::asForm()
            ->withBasicAuth($this->accountSid, $this->authToken)
            ->post($url, $payload);

        if (!$response->successful()) {
            $data = $response->json();
            $message = is_array($data) && isset($data['message']) ? $data['message'] : $response->body();
            $code = is_array($data) && isset($data['code']) ? $data['code'] : $response->status();

            throw new \RuntimeException("Twilio SMS send failed [{$code}]: {$message}");
        }

        return $response->json();
    }

    protected function normalizePhoneNumber(string $number): string
    {
        $number = trim($number);

        if ($number === '') {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Phone number cannot be empty.');
        }

        if (Str::startsWith($number, 'whatsapp:')) {
            return $number;
        }

        if ($number[0] === '+') {
            return $number;
        }

        $digits = preg_replace('/\D+/', '', $number) ?? '';
        if ($digits === '') {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Invalid phone number format.');
        }

        return '+' . $digits;
    }
}
